Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class PushSubscriptionDelivery

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.PushSubscriptionDelivery
public class PushSubscriptionDelivery extends Object
PushSubscriptionDelivery

Represents the delivery results of an event for a push subscription
